title: The Living Codex: Architecting the Forever Machine
author: Mike Levin

acts.title: Act I: Immutable Infrastructure & The Bedrock
acts.intro_prompt: The foundation of digital sovereignty. Rejecting the churn of 'it works on my machine' by embracing Nix, NixOS, and deterministic infrastructure as code.

acts.title: Act II: Hypermedia & The Pythonic Web
acts.intro_prompt: Escaping the SPA trap. Returning to 'HTML over the wire' with FastHTML, HTMX, and WET coding principles for radically diagnosable web applications.

acts.title: Act III: Sovereign AI & Local Inference
acts.intro_prompt: Breaking free from cloud-vendor lock-in. Running local models, establishing persistent AI identity, and surviving the proprietary AI API wars.

acts.title: Act IV: Literate Computing & Stateful Workflows
acts.intro_prompt: The notebook as an orchestrator. Bridging the gap between exploratory data science and production-ready automation using Jupyter and the Unix pipe philosophy.

acts.title: Act V: Context Engineering & Agentic Systems
acts.intro_prompt: Taming the amnesiac genie. Building robust human-AI collaboration through semantic routing, structured tool calling, and strategic context management.
